api_id.description: Identifier to assign to the API. Must be unique within scope of the parent resource(project)

display_name.description: A user-visible name for the API.

managed_service.description: Immutable. The name of a Google Managed Service ( https://cloud.google.com/service-infrastructure/docs/glossary#managed). If not specified, a new Service will automatically be created in the same project as this API.

labels.description: Resource labels to represent user-provided metadata. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
